narrative.label: 01 / The Mission
narrative.content: Architecting high-frequency trading infrastructure and scaling developer productivity for global distributed teams.

narrative.label: 02 / Strategic Impact
narrative.content: Modernized core trading systems by decomposing legacy monoliths into 12 multi-region microservices, improving system resilience by 30%.

narrative.label: 03 / Engineering Productivity
narrative.content: Pioneered AI-assisted refactoring workflows and custom CLI tools, reducing cycle time and boosting deployment frequency by 40%.

narrative.label: 01 / Performance
narrative.content: Led the overhaul of the client-side state management system, achieving sub-100ms interaction latency across the entire application.

narrative.label: 02 / Design Systems
narrative.content: Developed a custom motion-first component library that reduced bundle size by 25% while introducing physics-based interaction models.

narrative.label: 03 / Product Strategy
narrative.content: Spearheaded the 'Mobile First' initiative, ensuring parity between desktop and mobile web experiences for power users.

narrative.label: 01 / API Design
narrative.content: Refined the checkout integration flow, simplifying the developer experience for over 50k active merchants globally.

narrative.label: 02 / Reliability
narrative.content: Implemented automated chaos engineering tests for the payments pipeline, identifying and fixing 15+ critical edge-case failure modes.

narrative.label: 03 / Globalization
narrative.content: Expanded payment method support for 5 new emerging markets, including local compliance and tax calculation logic.

archive.mission: Optimized search indexing performance and internal observability tooling for large-scale distributed systems.
archive.outcome: Reduced p99 latency for search queries by 12% via distributed caching optimizations and predictive pre-fetching algorithms.

archive.mission: Developed experimental internal tools for real-time video stream analysis and content moderation.
archive.outcome: Improved automated flagging accuracy by 8% using advanced computer vision heuristics.

archive.mission: Built the MVP for a decentralized finance platform, handling everything from smart contract logic to frontend UI.
archive.outcome: Successfully launched and scaled to $2M in TVL within the first 6 months post-demo day.
